channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pharmacy fees and profits: Calls for reform amid rising costs
item.description: The article highlights concerns over escalating pharmacy dispensing fees in Australia, despite advancements in electronic prescribing and automation. It notes that government fees for dispensing scrip...

item.title: AIIMS Report Confirms Gym Belt Matched Skin Tissues in Twisha Sharma Case
item.description: The AIIMS medical board conducted a second postmortem in the Twisha Sharma case, confirming that skin tissues found on a gymnastics belt with a metal ring matched the injuries on her neck. This forens...

item.title: Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial: Prosecution Seeks Her Appearance
item.description: The House prosecution panel is seeking Vice President Sara Duterte's appearance in her impeachment trial to address allegations against her. Representative Ysabel Maria Jorge Zamora-Jornada, a member ...

item.title: Former Chelsea Chairman Ken Bates, Who Helped Rescue the Club from Financial Crisis, Dies at 94
item.description: Chelsea Football Club has announced the passing of its former owner and chairman, Ken Bates, who died peacefully in Monaco at the age of 94 with members of his family by his side. The club paid tribut...

item.title: Multilingualism Benefits Brain Health and Cognitive Function
item.description: The article explores the cognitive advantages of learning additional languages, highlighting scientific research indicating that multilingualism can slow brain ageing by up to 13 years. It discusses h...

item.title: Meta Removes AI Feature on Instagram Amid User Backlash
item.description: Meta, the parent company of Instagram, has decided to remove a controversial AI feature that allowed users to modify photos from public Instagram accounts using artificial intelligence. The feature, w...

item.title: Conspiracy Theories Spread After Senator Lindsey Graham's Death
item.description: The article details how conspiracy theories about the sudden death of U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham quickly spread online following his passing. Graham died on July 11, 2026, from a brief illness, as st...

item.title: Pakistan Mediates Peace Talks Between US and Iran Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar engaged in a critical telephone conversation with Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi to address escalating tensions between the US and Iran. T...

item.title: Tanzania Revenue Authority outlines strategies to achieve 41.83 trillion shilling revenue target
item.description: The Tanzania Revenue Authority (TRA) has unveiled new strategies to meet an ambitious revenue collection target of 41.830 trillion shillings for the 2026/2027 financial year. This follows a comprehens...

item.title: Former Google Executive Shot Dead in U.S., Husband Arrested
item.description: A former Google executive, Sheetal Wrzesien, was shot dead by her husband, Kirk B. Wrzesien, in Cobb County, Georgia, U.S. The incident occurred at their home on Laurel Creek Trail. Their son, Jason, ...

item.title: Limpopo authorities arrest five suspects in illegal chrome mining case
item.description: Five men have been arrested for allegedly conducting illegal chrome mining in Limpopo following a coordinated operation by the Hawks and multiple law enforcement agencies. The suspects, aged between 4...

item.title: Beachburg Fair Enhances Security Measures After Late-Night Incidents
item.description: The Beachburg Fair in Ottawa has implemented additional security measures following reports of late-night incidents that raised safety concerns among attendees. The decision comes after authorities no...

item.title: Kuria Backs Kang'ata in Ol Kalou By-Election, Highlights Gachagua's Fears
item.description: Former Trade Cabinet Secretary Moses Kuria has publicly supported Murang'a Governor Irungu Kang'ata ahead of the Linda Mwananchi rally in Nyahururu. Kuria warned against a 'monolithic dictatorship' in...

item.title: Senator Lacson Urges Early Resolution of Voting Threshold in Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial
item.description: Senator-judge Panfilo Lacson expressed hope that the voting threshold required to convict Vice President Sara Duterte in her impeachment trial would be resolved early to prevent complications later. H...

item.title: Western Bulldogs overcome West Coast Eagles in thrilling AFL clash
item.description: The Western Bulldogs secured a 13.8 (86) to 9.16 (70) victory over the West Coast Eagles at Marvel Stadium, overcoming a spirited performance from the Eagles. Marcus Bontempelli led the charge with 25...

item.title: Modern Retro-Design Home Combines Efficiency and Style in O'Connor
item.description: The Mellow Yellow House, located at 183a Miller Street in O'Connor, is a refined mid-century modern property that seamlessly blends retro aesthetics with contemporary energy-efficient features. This t...

item.title: Kawan Restaurant Review: A Disappointing Experience in London's Chinatown
item.description: This review of Kawan, a new restaurant in London's Chinatown, highlights its failed concept and poor execution. The establishment, founded by comedian Nigel Ng (known as Uncle Roger), relies heavily o...

item.title: BMF Leadership Crisis Intensifies with Suspension of Eighth Board Member
item.description: The Black Management Forum (BMF) faces escalating internal turmoil as President Mpho Motsei suspends the managing director, Monde Ndlovu, amid allegations of misconduct. This follows the formal suspen...

item.title: Climate change threatens South Africa's food processing industry – study highlights adaptation needs
item.description: A study in South Africa's Gauteng province reveals how climate shocks are disrupting the agri-processing sector, which contributes 25% of national manufacturing output and supports over 300,000 jobs. ...

item.title: Warriors NAIDOC Basketball Tournament Celebrates Cultural Unity and Community Spirit
item.description: The Warriors NAIDOC basketball tournament in Canberra brought together over 200 teams, showcasing a vibrant celebration of cultural diversity and community spirit. The event, held across multiple venu...
